subcodes.first_line: O thou real friend! At this time ‘Abdu'l-Baha is in the City of Alexandria is engaged in the mentioning of the friends
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی اکنون عبدالبهاء در مدینه اسکندریه بیاد یاران مشغول و شب و روز در
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment
